chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 48 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Petitioner Gul Hassan present in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh along with SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed for providing protection to him. The notices were issued to the official respondents. Today, response has been filed on behalf of Respondent No.3 / SSP, Sukkur, in which it has been stated that the concerned SHO Police Station, Rohri has already been directed by him to provide lawful protection to the petitioner in accordance with the law. The official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with the law and provide protection to the petitioner, as and when required. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
